title: Huawei S220S-8P4JX Gigabit PoE switch, 2x 2.5G SFP, 2x SFP+
description: Huawei S220S-8P4JX is a manageable L2 switch equipped with 8x 1Gbit Ethernet with PoE+ support, 2x 2.5G SFP and 2x SFP+ ports . The total PoE budget is 128W , ensuring reliable power for 8 devices under the 802.3af standard or 4 devices under the 802.3at standard with full power consumption. It supports all common L2 features and extensive management options, including management via the Huawei eKit App , enabling cloud management. With the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) service, the… The Huawei eKitEngine S220S series switches are L2 GE/10GE designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Advanced features, high reliability, extensive device management options, rack mounting, built-in 230V AC power supply, and fanless design enable use in various installation scenarios Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (4) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
